backend/main.mo: Main actor defining Recording type with language and paragraph fields, storing recordings in a Map, and exposing functions to create, retrieve, filter (by class/language/paragraph), and delete recordings with blob storage integration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old Recording type (without language/paragraph) to new Recording type by adding default language (#english) and paragraphNumber (1) to existing records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: language selection (Hindi/English), paragraph-based organization, enhanced RecordingInterface with language/paragraph inputs, and updated RecordingsList with language/paragraph display and filtering.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 14 frontend files describing the app structure: routing, pages (recording/playback/settings), components with language/paragraph support, custom hooks for audio/queries/settings, and styling with OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including recording/playback-specific color tokens and sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'Reading Recorder' title, root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining three routes (/, /playback, /settings) with Layout as root component and corresponding page components for each route.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component with header navigation (Record/Playback/Settings links with icons), main content outlet, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PlaybackControls: Audio playback UI component displaying recording metadata, progress slider with time display, and play/pause button using useAudioPlayer hook for playback control.
frontend/src/components/RecordingInterfa: Recording interface with class selector (2-7), language selector (Hindi/English), paragraph number input, animated record/stop button, duration timer, upload progress bar, and success/error alerts; persists selections to localStorage and creates recordings with all metadata.
frontend/src/components/RecordingsList.t: Displays a filterable list of audio recordings organized by class label (tabs), with language and paragraph filters, delete functionality, and selection handling for playback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: Provides audio playback controls (play, pause, seek) for ExternalBlob objects with state tracking for loading, playing status, current time, and duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioRecorder.ts: Handles browser-based audio recording using MediaRecorder API with configurable bitrate, returning recorded audio as Uint8Array and tracking recording state and duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY AuthClient with delegation identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching recordings (all, by class, language, paragraph) and mutations for creating and deleting recordings via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Manages user settings (bitrate, sample rate, playback speed, etc.) with localStorage persistence and provides update/reset functions.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light and dark themes, featuring warm amber/orange for recording states and calm blue for playback.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/PlaybackPage.tsx: Playback page component that displays a list of recordings and a playback controls panel, allowing users to select and play recorded reading sessions.
frontend/src/pages/RecordingPage.tsx: Recording page component that renders the RecordingInterface for creating new audio recordings with class selection.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page component providing configuration options for recording quality (bitrate, sample rate), storage management (auto-delete, max storage), and playback preferences (speed, volume) with reset functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, including recording/playback theme colors, typography settings, and design tokens for borders, shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting implemented features (audio recording, playback, settings, language support, paragraph organization) and pending feature requests for a recording reading application.
